description: SCPI k-sensitivity ablation: M6 leave-one-book-out predictions evaluated at k ∈ {3, 5, 10, 20} against weighted multi-source GT on 562-character corpus.
reference_note: k=5 is the bake-off production setting per aperture_method_bakeoff.py line 420; matches the M6 SCPI headline MAE 0.328 in paper Table 1.
verdict: SCPI performance is monotone-stable across k ∈ {3, 5, 10, 20} (max |ΔMAE| = 0.0133 = 4.0% of reference). Higher k slightly improves MAE (k=20 best at 0.3149) but at minor cost to CCC (0.2337 vs k=5 0.2679). The k=5 default holds for paper headlines.
method: LOBO-fair: source-book excluded; FAISS IndexFlatIP cosine similarity over L2-normalized text-embedding-3-large character mean-utterance vectors (3072-d).
